TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pasongan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 113 buwan, 259 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 237 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 88%, Bunun 0.5%, Tayan 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pasongan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pasongan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pasongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pasongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pasongan hya' ga Pakara'ac. tay mkyahu' na Pasongan hya' ga Kinanoka. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Pasongan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pas~ɕoŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *.*%, tajan *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa pakaraʔaʦ~ʨ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa kinanoka. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan alaŋ pas~ɕoŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pasongan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 113 buwan, 259 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 237 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 88%, Bunun 0.5%, Tayan 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pasongan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pasongan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pasongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pasongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pasongan hya' ga Pakara'ac. tay mkyahu' na Pasongan hya' ga Kinanoka. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Pasongan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pas~ɕoŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *.*%, tajan *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa pakaraʔaʦ~ʨ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pas~ɕoŋan ħjaʔ ɣa kinanoka. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan alaŋ pas~ɕoŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
